name: western-blot-mcp
description: AI-powered western blot image interpretation with auditable step-by-step reasoning.
long_description:
Analyzes western blot images and returns structured results: band detection, lane QC, image quality flags, and a step-by-step reasoning chain so researchers can validate every conclusion.

Detects overexposure, loading control problems (including GAPDH invalidity in hypoxia/aging/metabolic studies), ghost bands, smile effect, and image integrity issues — based on peer-reviewed western blot literature.

Supports any vision-capable model via LiteLLM: Gemini (default), Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, and DeepSeek.

tools.name: analyze_western_blot
tools.description: Analyze a western blot image. Returns band detection, lane QC, image quality flags, and step-by-step reasoning.

google_api_key.title: Google API Key
google_api_key.description: API key for Gemini (the default model). Get one free at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey. Required when using a Gemini model.

model.title: Model
model.description: LiteLLM model string: 'gemini/gemini-3.1-flash-lite', 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6', 'openai/gpt-4o'. Must support vision/image inputs.
